name: Dogwood Therapeutics, Inc.
summary: PARTI Our Company We are a pre-revenue, development-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing new medicines to treat pain and neuropathy. Following the closing of the Combination described below, we became the sole owner of Pharmagesic (Holdings) Inc. (Pharmagesic) and their wholly owned subsidiary, Wex Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Wex), and Wexs wholly owned subsidiaries, IWT Bio, Inc. (IWT), Wex Medical Corporation (WMC), and Wex Medical Limited (WML). Our pipeline is focused on treating...
